description: Create a clinical screening survey titled 'Influenza Vaccine Study Screener 2026' for an influenza vaccine study in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). The survey must capture the participant's Date of Birth (Code: 'DOB') and calculate their age (Code: 'AGE_CALC'). Ensure that a 'Medical History' group, containing at least three medical questions, is only visible if the calculated age is between 18 and 65 years old (inclusive). Activate the survey once configured.
